creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

I will admit that I have stared at this one on and off without making 
progress in coming up with an explanation. 

One thing I see is -stdlib=libc++  -std=c++11 as flags for src, but 
those do not seem to be used for building this port. 

I do not think this is specific to the CPU being used; is there anything 
else which is different between those machines where it works and the one 
where it does not? 

Can you still reproduce this?  

And what happens, if you bootstrap the port, that is, remove the 
line --disable-bootstrap from CONFIGURE_ARGS? 

(Also, but that's better for another PR or direct e-mail, what 
issues do you have with lang/gcc47?  It might be more productive 
to get this addressed?)
